name: Crock Pot Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 lb boiling potatoes, peeled or unpeeled -- cut into 3/4-inch cubes
1 lb beef round, trimmed of all fat -- cut into bite-size pieces
1 1/2 cups beef broth, defatted or bouillon
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large crock pot, combine the onion, garlic, potatoes, cabbage, carrot, and rice.
2. Add the meat to the crock pot.
3. In a 4-cup measure or similar bowl, stir together the broth, wine, ketchup, brown sugar, vinegar, thyme, chili powder, mustard, and black pepper.
4. Pour the mixture over the meat and vegetables in the crock pot.
5. Cover the crock pot and cook on high for 1 hour.
6. Stir the meat and vegetables into the sauce, then cover and cook an additional 6 to 8 hours on low.
NUTRITIONAL DATA (based on 6 servings):
Per Serving: Calories 289
Fat (gm) 6.0 Sat. fat (gm) 1.9 Cholesterol (mg) 51 Sodium (mg) 287 Protein (gm) 21 Carbohydrate (gm) 34 % Calories from fat 18
